utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format. The final package includes all 7 labeled fields. The format says 'complete cost breakdown' which implies an itemized breakdown, not just a single total. Since itemization is not provided here, this item is not fully specified. Conclusion: 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.
